reasoning_model_1: The model generates the target sentence 'Kids, remember to tidy up your rooms after dinner' (00:00-00:03). However, it critically fails in content accuracy by continuing to read the prompt's style description and instructions: 'This is an adult voice speaking. Calm but firm like a parent or guardian giving a gentle reminder' (00:03-00:11). This is a severe hallucination/instruction-following error. Regarding the 'Age' dimension, the voice timbre is high-pitched and bright, resembling a young adult or a stylized character rather than a mature adult parent. While it technically falls within the adult range (young adult), the breaking of character by reading the prompt metadata severely detracts from the persona validation.
reasoning_model_2: The model accurately reads the requested text 'Kids, remember to tidy up your rooms after dinner' (00:00-00:04) without any omissions or additions, satisfying content accuracy requirements perfectly. In terms of the 'Age' dimension, the voice exhibits a mature female timbre with a lower pitch and steady resonance, characteristic of a standard adult voice (likely 30s-40s). The pacing is deliberate and the tone is appropriate for a parent giving a reminder. The synthesis is fluent and the paralinguistic feature of an 'adult voice' is clearly and naturally expressed.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 committed a major error in content accuracy by reading the prompt instructions ('This is an adult voice speaking...') instead of just the target text. Furthermore, Model 2's voice timbre was more representative of a mature adult parent, whereas Model 1 sounded somewhat youthful and stylized. Model 2 followed all constraints perfectly.
